title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer! What training should we
start off with today?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, energy means power! And power means
strength!
choice_data_list: Those kind of sound like the same thing...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Mmm... Well, the main point is that
strength is vital!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to need a lot more strength if I hope to
become my ideal self.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue to be someone I'm proud of.
It's too soon to stop now.
choice_data_list: That's what it means to be a princess.
That's what it means to be a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yes! Now then, I'll warm up with a light run
around the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess starts running around the
track. She called it a warm-up, but she shoots
past like a gale.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
"You can become stronger than a raging
tempest."

"You can become stronger than a raging
tempest."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah, right, the next line is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"My prince, how did my running and my spirit
appear in your eyes?"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I think that's enough reciting of Princess
Fighter lines.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Tell me for real, Trainer. How do I look in your
eyes?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I want to hear it in your own words.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And in my eyes, you're the ultimate trainer!
